## 🚀 Quick Start (Fastest Way)

Run the project in just a few commands:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Dhanush7-tech/collegebot.git
cd collegebot
pip install -r requirements.txt
cd backend
uvicorn api:app --reload

Open in browser:
http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs

⚙️ How to Run This Project

Follow these step-by-step instructions to run CollegeBot on your system.

1️.Clone the Repository
git clone https://github.com/Dhanush7-tech/collegebot.git
cd collegebot

2️.Install Dependencies
Install all required Python libraries:

pip install -r requirements.txt

📌 Important
Make sure you are inside the collegebot folder before running commands.

🧰 Requirements
Python 3.8 or higher
pip (Python package manager)

3️⃣ Run the Application
You can run the project in two ways:

▶️ Option A: CLI Chatbot
python backend/Main.py
💡 Runs the chatbot in terminal with menu-based interaction

🌐 Option B: FastAPI Backend (Recommended)
cd backend
uvicorn api:app --reload

💡 Starts a local server for web/API usage

4️⃣ Open in Browser
After starting the API, open:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
💡 This opens an interactive API interface where you can test the chatbot

🧪 Example Test
Open /chat
Click Try it out
Enter:
{
  "message": "hi"
}
Click Execute

📂 Project Structure
collegebot/
│── backend/        # Python backend (API + CLI)
│── data/           # JSON datasets
│── requirements.txt
│── README.md

⚠️ Common Issues
❌ Git not installed
→ Install Git and retry

❌ Module not found error
→ Run:
pip install -r requirements.txt

❌ Wrong folder
→ Make sure you're inside collegebot
